title: Safeguarding partners yearly reports analysis 2023 to 2024
body: "This report analyses the 2023 to 2024 safeguarding yearly report to:   understand how safeguarding partnerships have developed their approaches examine the similarities, differences, and positive steps taken by partnerships towards the implementation of the working together to safeguard children 2023 arrangements identify examples of good practice and case studies that demonstrate positive approaches across safeguarding partnerships propose a report template which safeguarding partnership can use when producing future reports   "
